grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive license to use System at specified location (§2.1)
grant_and_term.reserved_rights: Franchisor reserves all rights not expressly granted (§2.2)

fee_obligations.monthly_program_fee: 4% GRR, adjustable up to +1% over term (§8.1)
fee_obligations.calculation: Per Uniform System of Accounts for Lodging Industry (§8.2)
fee_obligations.taxes: Franchisee pays any sales/use/gross receipts tax on franchisor's fee receipts (§8.4)
fee_obligations.set_off: Franchisor may reduce any payment to franchisee by amounts owed (§8.7)

construction_requirements.necessary_consents: Must get approval of architect, designer, GC, major subs (§6.1.1)
construction_requirements.plan_approval: Must get approval of plans/specs before starting construction (§6.1.2-6.1.4)
construction_requirements.commencement: New dev: 16 months from application approval; Conv: per PIP (§6.3)
construction_requirements.completion: New dev: 36 months from approval; Conv: per PIP (§6.3)
construction_requirements.opening: Must receive written authorization before opening (§6.4)
construction_requirements.refurbishment: Must comply with FRCM renovation schedules and Standards changes (§6.6)

training_obligations.required: GM and key personnel must complete all required training programs (§4.1, 5.1.5)
training_obligations.replacement: Replacements must complete training within 90 days (§4.1)

operational_obligations.standards_compliance: Must comply with Standards/Manual at all times (§5.1)
operational_obligations.management_approval: Management (self or Management Company) must be approved (§7.0)
operational_obligations.reservation_service: Must use Hilton Reservation Service exclusively for outgoing referrals
operational_obligations.hilton_honors: Must participate in all required loyalty programs
operational_obligations.data_ownership: All hotel/guest data is franchisor property (§10.4)
operational_obligations.privacy: Must comply with all applicable privacy laws (§10.5)

transfer_restrictions.permitted_without_notice: Publicly traded equity, <50% private equity (no control change), institutional fund transfers (§12.2.1.1)
transfer_restrictions.permitted_with_notice: Affiliate, family, trust, death, >50% cumulative equity change — 60 days notice + consent + $5,500 (§12.2.1.2)
transfer_restrictions.change_of_ownership: $200,000 fee, 60 days notice, full compliance, transferee meets new-franchisee standards, signs current FA (§12.2.2)

noncompete.during_term: No ownership/licensing of competing brand; may be franchisee or manage competitor; may own minority interest (§5.1.29)

guaranty_scope.scope: Certain obligations under FA (determined after financial review)
guaranty_scope.third_party: May require third-party guaranty as condition of lender comfort letter or cure of default

liquidated_damages.post_opening_first_2_yrs: Greater of Hotel's or System's Avg Monthly Royalty × 60 (§13.4)
liquidated_damages.last_60_months: Hotel's Avg Monthly Royalty × remaining months (§13.4)
liquidated_damages.actual_damages_alternative: Under special circumstances, franchisor may elect actual damages instead (§13.5)

venue_and_dispute_resolution.venue: ED Virginia (Alexandria) or state court in Fairfax County, VA or NYC; franchisor may sue where hotel is located (§16.2.2)

indemnification.scope: Franchisee must defend, indemnify, hold harmless franchisor, Hilton Worldwide, all affiliates, subsidiaries, officers, directors, employees, agents, successors, assigns (§14)
indemnification.trigger: Any action, claim, demand, proceeding arising from hotel operations
indemnification.notice: 5 days written notice of any action (§14.3)
indemnification.separate_counsel: Franchisor may obtain separate counsel at franchisee expense if interests conflict (§14.4)
indemnification.no_mitigation_required: Indemnified parties need not seek recovery from third parties (§14.4)

general_release.scope: On execution of FA, franchisee releases franchisor from all claims existing before Effective Date (§16.8)
general_release.exception: Claims related to representations in FDD

force_majeure.provision: Events of Force Majeure may excuse failure to operate for 5+ consecutive days (§13.2(6))
force_majeure.casualty: Hotel must reopen within 18 months after casualty-caused closure; extensions negotiable (§11.2)
force_majeure.condemnation: Franchisor may terminate; no liquidated damages (§11.1)
force_majeure.no_term_extension: Force majeure or casualty does not extend the Term (§11.3)

distinctive_clauses.economic_conditions_not_defense: Economic downturn or financial inability is not a defense to breach (§16.10)
distinctive_clauses.confidentiality_of_negotiated_terms: Franchisee may not disclose negotiated terms without consent; violation is default (§16.18)
distinctive_clauses.consent_limited_remedy: Franchisee may not claim money damages for unreasonably withheld consent; sole remedy is specific performance (§16.6.2)
distinctive_clauses.exemption_acknowledgment: Franchisee acknowledges investment exceeds $1,469,600 FTC exemption threshold (§18)
distinctive_clauses.collateral_pledge: All HFH assets and franchise contracts pledged as collateral for Hilton's debt (Note 7 of financial statements)
